compiled_state.author: RebarBotNava
compiled_state.description:
## Reproduction Steps
1. Let Dockerfile.reviewbot's entrypoint materialize the persistent tickets worktree (git clone --single-branch of the tickets branch) with REVIEWBOT_TICKETS_PAT set.
2. Any store WRITE from the container (emit_code_review_artifact -> rebar.create_ticket, repo_root=None -> tracker /var/gerrit/site/reviewbot-tickets) fails: first with 'ticket system not initialized' (.env-id is GITIGNORED so no clone ever has it; only rebar init / the ensure-registry generates it), and after ensures with 'Author identity unknown' (container has no git user.name/email).
3. emit_code_review_artifact swallows the exception (best-effort by design), so every prod review silently emits nothing — the code_review data-capture feature (story limestone-unethical-zebrafinch) has never produced a real artifact (the only code_review tickets in the store are test fixtures).

**Expected:** a fresh container + volume yields a writable ambient store; artifacts are emitted+pushed per review. **Actual:** write-dead store; silent no-op emission.

Proven on prod 2026-07-10 (f600 verification): in-container probe reproduced both failures; after run_ensures(tracker) + repo-local git identity (RebarBotNava / joeoakhart+bot@navapbc.com) a probe create succeeded AND auto-pushed to origin/tickets (d3ee-c7b6-061e-4a66). The prod worktree volume is now manually converged, but any FRESH volume/clone regresses — the entrypoint must do this.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Entrypoint (or app startup) runs the ensure-registry (rebar._store.ensures.run_ensures) and sets a repo-local git identity on the tickets worktree after clone — idempotent on restart.
- [ ] A container test (or stub harness) proves a write against a fresh single-branch clone succeeds.
- [ ] Emission failures are observable: the swallowed exception should at least surface in a countable log marker (observability greppable), not only DEBUG.
- [ ] File paths: infra/compose/Dockerfile.reviewbot, src/rebar/review_bot/voter.py.
compiled_state.title: review-bot entrypoint's fresh tickets clone is write-dead: no .env-id ensure, no git identity — artifact emission structurally broken
